proposedStrategy: This strategy enforces that any platform-agent-created durable authority must be invalid unless it is fully backed by the conveyor's source artifacts, manifest, handoff packet, and receipt. By requiring these conveyor-backed elements, the strategy ensures that agents coordinate authority creation through the conveyor system rather than manual or ad hoc semantic authority authoring. This preserves integrity, traceability, and coordination across agents and platform components.
sourceStory: As a Defracto platform operator, I want platform-agent-created durable authority to be invalid unless it is backed by conveyor source, manifest, handoff packet, and receipt, so that agents coordinate through the conveyor instead of manually authoring semantic authority.
